title: Lane Racer
description: A top-down racing game where you pilot a car down a narrow lane, dodging obstacles and other vehicles. Use arrow keys to steer left and right. Avoid collisions to maintain your 3 lives. Earn points for each obstacle you dodge successfully. Reach 500 points or survive 2 minutes to win. Difficulty levels affect obstacle spawn rates. Features persistent high-score leaderboard, multiple obstacle types with unique mechanics, sprite-based rendering, and ambient audio.
